sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ الْمُسَافِرُونَ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ وَطَلَبُوا دَلِيلًا سِيَاحِيًّا.
sentences.translation: Putnici su stigli u grad i tražili turistički vodič.
sentences.translationEn: The travelers arrived in the city and asked for a tourist guide.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَتْهُمُ الْمَرْأَةُ فِي الْمَكْتَبِ كِتَيِّبًا عَنِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Žena u uredu im je dala brošuru o gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The woman at the office gave them a booklet about the city.

sentences.arabic: قَرَؤُوا الْكِتَيِّبَ وَاخْتَارُوا الْأَمَاكِنَ الَّتِي يُرِيدُونَهَا.
sentences.translation: Pročitali su brošuru i odabrali mjesta koja žele.
sentences.translationEn: They read the booklet and chose the places they wanted.

sentences.translation: Počeli su posjetu od velikog muzeja.
sentences.translationEn: They started their visit with the large museum.
